Craft Room Crash: Let's Make Something Pretty - Cute Capelett

Video.summary: This Coffee Filter Bouquet is a gorgeous paper flower tutorial for your big day. Make a DIY bridal bouquet out of coffee filters with this free crafting video. Combining dyed coffee filters and die cutting techniques, this forever flower bouquet is a charming and secretly cheap way to make a wedding bouquet. Consider making this homemade bouquet idea for a wedding, baby shower, or for spring accents in your home. You never have to worry about it wilting!
Video.title: FaveCrafts: Coffee Filter Bouquet

Image.alt: FaveCrafts: Coffee Filter Bouquet
FaveCrafts: Coffee Filter Bouquet

Video.summary: Craft along with Froggy as she transforms the Violet Costumed Action Figure into a one of a kind Custom Doll! Create the Incredibles 2 Violet alter Ego ... you know ... Violet without her Costume!!
Video.title: My Froggy Stuff: How to Make Incredibles 2 Violet CUSTOM DOLL

Image.alt: My Froggy Stuff: How to Make Incredibles 2 Violet CUSTOM DOLL
My Froggy Stuff: How to Make Incredibles 2 Violet CUSTOM DOLL

Video.summary: DIY! Let's make Care Bears doll nursery, crib mini figures, custom rug & more!

My Froggy Stuff: DIY How to Make Care Bears Nursery - Mini Figures - Custom Rug & More

Video.summary: Barbie Cutie Reveal outfits look like costumes to me!!! Which is perfect because Rainbow High Dolls are also bringing the costumes this year. So let’s take an up close look at a few looks from Both... and maybe a little costume contest?
Video.title: My Froggy Stuff: Barbie Cutie Reveal and Rainbow High Costume Ball

Image.alt: My Froggy Stuff: Barbie Cutie Reveal and Rainbow High Costume Ball
My Froggy Stuff: Barbie Cutie Reveal and Rainbow High Costume Ball

Craft Room Crash: Let's Go Make Something! - A Lesson In Pottery

Video.summary: Watch this DIY video tutorial to learn How to make a Spring Wreath. Adding colorful spring wreaths to your home is a fabulous way to make your space blossom with very little effort. Follow along with this home decor craft tutorial to create a stunning and bright project. This DIY craft is easy to make, and you can use just about any fabric you would like. Get started on your own DIY wreath for the most cheerful of seasons!
Video.title: FaveCrafts: How to Make a Spring Wreath

Image.alt: FaveCrafts: How to Make a Spring Wreath
FaveCrafts: How to Make a Spring Wreath

Video.summary: Ready for an excuse to use up those scrap paper pieces that have been lying around? This Cute Scrap Paper Garland is the perfect craft that can clear up some of those extra paper pieces. Plus, you get a really cute DIY home decor garland that you can make and use for all different kinds of occasions. No matter where you hang this homemade garland, it is sure to get complimented. Plus, using die cuts make creating this DIY garland super quick and easy!
Video.title: FaveCrafts: Cute Scrap Paper Garland

Image.alt: FaveCrafts: Cute Scrap Paper Garland
FaveCrafts: Cute Scrap Paper Garland

Video.summary: Sometimes it can really be a challenge finding the exact style you want from a headband. This Fleece Flower DIY Headband shows you how you can make the perfect floral headband just the way you want. This DIY headband project is the perfect flirty and girly headband that makes a great DIY gift too. If you have a friend that loves flowers, or are even contemplating what to get your flower girl in your wedding make them this handmade headband and they will be in love!
Video.title: FaveCrafts: Fleece Flower DIY Headband

Image.alt: FaveCrafts: Fleece Flower DIY Headband
FaveCrafts: Fleece Flower DIY Headband
